title: epimedium × youngianum var. concinnum
intro: Epimedium × youngianum var. concinnum, also known as barborrie, is a hybrid plant species in the family Berberidaceae, derived from the cross between Epimedium youngianum and Epimedium pinnatum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Epimedium × youngianum var. concinnum include improving blood circulation, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures, with recommended dosages varying depending on the individual's health needs and the specific preparation method.
